title: SpyCloud - Breach Investigation
content:
SpyCloud Breach playbook gets executed on the occurrence of the incident SpyCloud Breach Data type.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the SpyCloud pack (SpyCloudEnterpriseProtection, partner-supported).

Inputs — Minimum Password Length: Minimum length of password.

Integrations/scripts used: StringLength.
